title: Cross-runtime doctor command mirror missing for 3/4 runtimes
evidence: 5 new 013 doctor commands (memory, causal-graph, deep-loop, cocoindex, update) exist only in .opencode/commands/doctor/ (24 files total). .claude/commands/ and .codex/commands/ do not exist. .gemini/commands/doctor/ has only 2 pre-existing MCP commands in .toml format.
scopeProof: glob(.claude/commands/**) returns 0. glob(.codex/commands/**) returns 0. glob(.gemini/commands/doctor/**) returns 2 (mcp_install.toml, mcp_debug.toml). glob(.opencode/commands/doctor/**) returns 24.
recommendation: Mirror all 10 doctor commands to .claude/commands/doctor/, .codex/commands/doctor/, and expand .gemini/commands/doctor/ from 2 to 10 commands, or document .opencode/-only policy.

title: Doc-code drift: last_active_child_id falsely claimed as set in 002-sandbox-testing-playbook docs
evidence: handover.md:100, implementation-summary.md:72, implementation-summary.md:252, resource-map.md:176 all claim parent graph-metadata.json last_active_child_id is set to 002, but actual field at graph-metadata.json:220 is null.
scopeProof: grep last_active_child_id in 002-sandbox-testing-playbook/ finds 5 doc claims of set status + 1 checklist item correctly unflagged (CHK-504). Parent graph-metadata.json:220 is null.
recommendation: Either run generate-context.js on 002 to populate the field, or correct the 4 doc locations to note the field is still null.

title: Gemini runtime doctor commands use inconsistent .toml format vs .md format
evidence: Gemini's 2 doctor commands use TOML format while .opencode/commands/doctor/ uses Markdown format. Both reference .opencode/commands/doctor/assets/ YAML. 013's 5 new commands follow .md pattern.
scopeProof: Only 2 .toml files in .gemini/commands/doctor/. .opencode/commands/doctor/ uses .md entrypoints with YAML frontmatter.
recommendation: Add .toml mirrors for 5 new 013 commands or document format divergence as intentional.

title: Parent spec.md scope section doesn't mention allowed cross-cutting docs
evidence: Files to Change table lists only 3 lean trio files, but parent directory has 5 (trio + handover.md + resource-map.md). Cross-cutting docs are explicitly allowed per AGENTS.md.
scopeProof: spec.md:88-95 lists 3 files. Parent directory listing shows 5 files. No policy violation — documentation clarity only.
recommendation: Optionally expand Files to Change table or add note clarifying cross-cutting doc allowance.

notes: Parent has required trio + 2 allowed cross-cutting docs. No heavy doc leak. REQ-P-001 satisfied. last_active_child_id still null (R2-P1-001).
All 12 agents (11 + README) present in all 4 runtimes. Format follows runtime convention (.md for opencode/claude/gemini, .toml for codex).
5 new 013 doctor commands only in .opencode/. .claude/ and .codex/ have no commands directory. .gemini/ has only 2 pre-existing MCP commands. See R8-P1-001.
4 docs claim last_active_child_id is set; actual field is null. checklist.md CHK-504 correctly flags the gap. See R8-P1-002.
REQ-P-001 satisfied (lean trio). REQ-P-002 still failing (R2-P1-001). REQ-P-003 satisfied (children_ids).
CHK-504 (last_active_child_id) unchecked. No cross-runtime command mirror checklist items exist.
Agent mirrors clean (12/run). Command mirrors fail (R8-P1-001).
Resource-map paths verified on disk for parent aggregate. No fabricated paths.
